message:
fix: detect external BEADS_DIR without redirect file

When BEADS_DIR points to a .beads directory in a different git repo,
bd now detects this by comparing git common dirs rather than requiring
a .beads/redirect file. This fixes repo root resolution for external
BEADS_DIR setups.

Co-authored-by: Tim Visher <tim.visher@gmail.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
